name: Cabbage Carrot & Onion Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cabbage into small pieces.
2. In a separate container, cut carrots into thin rounds.
3. Peel onions and cut into small pieces.
4. In a medium-sized pan, sauté the onion with butter or margarine until soft.
5. Add mustard seeds for 30 seconds.
6. Add cumin powder, coriander powder, and turmeric powder; mix the spices.
7. Add carrots to the pan and continue sautéing.
8. Put the lid on for 5 minutes.
9. Add cabbage and mix all vegetables together.
10. Stir in cinnamon powder, salt, and chili powder.
11. Replace the lid and cook for another 5 minutes.
12. Carefully turn over the mixture to prevent spices from sticking to the bottom of the pan.
13. Put the lid back on and continue cooking until desired tenderness is reached (up to 8 minutes).
14. Serve hot or warm.
